zh.Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mehitable Dalton於1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克時，她的父親Philemon Dalton50歲，母親Anne Cole38歲。她於1670年5月31日之前與John Barsham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1678年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mehitable Dalton于1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克时，她的父亲Philemon Dalton50岁，母亲Anne Cole38岁。她于1670年5月31日之前与John Barsham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1678年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1652: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Mehitable Dalton was born in 1640, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Philemon Dalton, was 50 and her mother, Anne Cole, was 38. She married John Barsham before 31 May 1670, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1678, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mehitable Dalton est née en 1640, à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Philemon Dalton, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Anne Cole, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé John Barsham avant 31 mai 1670, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1678, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mehitable Dalton 1640 in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philemon Dalton 50 und ihre Mutter Anne Cole 38. Sie hat vor 31. Mai 1670 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Barsham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1678 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitable Dalton è nata il nel 1640 nel York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Philemon Dalton, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Anne Cole, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato John Barsham prima del 31 maggio 1670, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1678, nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mehitable Daltonが1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークで生まれた時，父Philemon Daltonは50歳，母Anne Coleは38歳であった。1670年5月31日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでJohn Barshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1678年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスで38歳で死去した。

ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.York, York, Massachusetts Bay, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크
ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함
ko.lifeSummary: Mehitable Dalton(이)가 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philemon Dalton(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Cole(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1670년 5월 31일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 John Barsham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitable Dalton nasceu em 1640, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Philemon Dalton, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Anne Cole, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com John Barsham antes 31 de maio de 1670, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1678, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mehitable Dalton родилась в 1640 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Philemon Dalton было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Cole, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Barsham перед 31 май 1670 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1678 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mehitable Dalton nació en 1640, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Philemon Dalton, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Anne Cole, tenía 38 años. Se casó con John Barsham antes de 31 de mayo de 1670, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1678, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años.
